notableEvents.label: Colt Keith GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Colt Keith grounds into a double play, first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino to shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Gleyber Torres out at 2nd. Colt Keith out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Salvador Perez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Salvador Perez grounds into a double play, second baseman Gleyber Torres to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Vinnie Pasquantino out at 2nd. Salvador Perez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jonathan India pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jonathan India lines out to third baseman Zach McKinstry.

notableEvents.label: Starling Marte pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Starling Marte grounds into a force out, fielded by third baseman Zach McKinstry. Jac Caglianone out at 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Jonathan India pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jonathan India flies out to left fielder Riley Greene.
